notes: A fresh real plugin runtime was launched from the rebuilt ASCII-path unpacked extension on a clean Chrome profile.

The previous Unauthorized plugin OTP failure was resolved by rebuilding the local extension against the current California PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY and using a fresh debug profile instead of a stale cached extension runtime.
The real plugin runtime completed SEND_OTP, VERIFY_OTP, REGISTER_INSTALLATION, and CREATE_CHECKOUT with source=chrome_extension.

California recorded the source=chrome_extension checkout row as completed, processed the paid order.completed webhook, wrote orders and payments, and upgraded the fresh user from free to lifetime active.
The popup UI showed plan=lifetime, status=active, pro_access=enabled, and remaining unlimited after webhook-driven entitlement refresh.
next_step: Keep SMTP independence, low-memory acceptance, and formal cutover approval as the remaining California cutover blockers.
